# Caydeesoft Payments

Laravel mobile money payment gateway package for African payment providers.

## Summary

`caydeesoft/payments` provides a Laravel facade, service provider, configurable payment channels and callback routes for M-Pesa, Airtel Money, T-Kash, EazzyPay, MTN Mobile Money and Tigo.

## Primary Use Cases

- Initiate M-Pesa STK Push requests.
- Generate provider access tokens.
- Register and process payment callback URLs.
- Query balances and transaction status.
- Process refunds, reversals, B2C payouts and B2B transfers.
- Normalize callbacks from providers with unclear or partner-specific documentation.

## Important Files

- `composer.json`: package metadata and Laravel auto-discovery.
- `src/config/payments.php`: package configuration.
- `src/Libs/Payments.php`: channel selector and facade target.
- `src/Libs/Mpesa.php`: M-Pesa driver.
- `src/Libs/AirtelMoney.php`: Airtel Money driver.
- `src/Libs/Tkash.php`: T-Kash driver.
- `src/Libs/EazzyPay.php`: EazzyPay driver.
- `src/Libs/Mtn.php`: MTN Mobile Money driver.
- `src/Libs/Tigo.php`: Tigo/Tigo Pesa driver.
- `src/routes/payments.php`: callback routes.
- `src/Http/Controllers/CallbackController.php`: callback dispatcher.
- `mcp.json`: MCP-style tool and resource catalog.

## Safe Agent Guidance

Do not invent provider credentials. Do not execute live payment requests without explicit user confirmation. Prefer sandbox environment for examples. When provider documentation is unclear, use the request-level `endpoint` override and preserve the original callback payload.
